textByHash.7ceb54658226632e1a5e13161d56b0e6ce423e32: Your greatest achievement was my downfall, my lord. The lizardmen blamed me for your disappearance and sealed me away. I was trapped for centuries.
textByHash.ad17ee1262cb6170ede3c87508a68702273df552: I managed to convince their shamans I was on their side. They set me free. I have been trying to find you ever since.
textByHash.580f9348177df41877fd929686c2c78a7f580972: With humble respect, my lord, this treasure hunter is not the one to thank.
textByHash.4a817e1a2e7003c2bf08be3fb5a1ed9a4a8ff800: It was me. I was the one who worked out how to find you. I planted the seeds that eventually led him to you.
textByHash.f2a408ac022c16f6a1c824299221ea3b8f75da4c: The world has changed. Working from the shadows has served me well. And now it has reunited us once more.
textByHash.50e2849ec3f42d218b24be1b6c65520d15d66e87: The same end as always, my lord. Quidamortem has been lost to us, but there are other ways to harness the Dark Altar.
textByHash.356cbf9f604d6301bfad94bd9b3398ce6070ae41: I needed access to the Altar. They were a means to an end.
textByHash.06202933ca2995c1b07799bc69dd8ba070951deb: And with you, Zachariah. So, it's really true?
